name: bright
description: Agent-oriented Bright Data web intelligence, research, extraction, and dataset workflows over MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Search, research, extract, and inspect web data
interface.longDescription: Use seven agent-oriented Bright Data tools for live search, source discovery, exact reading, structured extraction, research, and Marketplace datasets, with an interactive dataset workbench where supported.
defaultPrompt: Research this question with current sources.
Extract a structured table from these pages.
Find the right maintained dataset for this task.
